name: Basil Chicken Medley
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and cook until fragrant and golden brown.
3. Add chicken pieces to the skillet and cook until no longer pink, about 6-8 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add zucchini and tomatoes; cook for about 3-4 minutes until vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in dried basil, vinegar, and pepper, then toss to coat the vegetables well.
7. Return the chicken to the skillet and stir-fry with the vegetables for another 2-5 minutes.
8. Serve hot over cooked rice or pasta.
